title: Phonological Awareness Training — The Foundation of Reading Success
summary:
One-day Phonological Awareness Training for Pre-School and Elementary Teachers, School Leaders and Parents. Led by Anita S. Whyte, EdS. — Literacy Coach, Educator, Trainer and Reading, Phonics & Writing Specialist.

Strong sounds. Strong start. Strong readers. Phonological awareness is the #1 predictor of reading success.

Register at thewhyteacademy.com or call +233 545 223 324.

title: Couples Retreat 2026 — A Time to Reconnect, Refresh and Rediscover
summary:
Couples Retreat 2026 — a special four-day getaway designed to help you reconnect, refresh, and rediscover each other in a beautiful resort setting.
Your experience includes a 3-night luxury stay at Aqua Safari Resort, daily buffet breakfast, lunch and dinner, retreat sessions, exciting couple bonding activities, and quality time for relaxation and fun together.
Cost: GHC 9,999 per couple
Registration deadline: 21st August 2026
To register, WhatsApp: 054 522 3324
